content:
# Recommendations вҖ” next plan iter (post iter-037)

## Closest-to-completion / prioritize
1. **`H_tensor` (1.1.3) вҖ” STEP 3 (Оё-iso close).** ALL substrate now exists: `htensorComparison` (Оё map @035), functorial substrate `HMapFst{,_id,_comp}` (@036), and now **Оё-naturality `htensorComparison_naturality` (@037)**. This is the FIRST iter sanctioned to add the 2 gated anchors:
   - `External.pullbackUnit : f^*рқ’Ә_S вү… рқ’Ә_X` (small; Оё_рқ’Ә = iso; absent for `Scheme.Modules.pullback`).
   - a **per-presentation / LFP-admissible-scoped** EilenbergвҖ“Watts comparison anchor (NOT total endofunctors вҖ” the `вҲҖJ,Admissible` vacuity caveat makes the total form un-instantiable). Decide its precise signature: scope to the free presentation `рқ’Ә^J вҶ’ рқ’Ә^K вҶ’ N` of an admissible `N`.
   - Then: Оё iso on each free summand by вҠ• of Оё_рқ’Ә; iso on coker `N` by right-exactness, using `htensorComparison_naturality` for the 5-lemma/presentation chase. `H_tensor := вҖҰ` from the resulting iso.

## Coverage debt (MANDATORY вҖ” author blueprint stub)
- **`compose_three_squares`** (`MR0555258CompactifyingPicard/Basic.lean`, ~L2030, private lemma, `lean_aux`, axiom-free, dep_count 0). Pure category-theory plumbing: chain three commuting squares into one fourfold-composite equation. NO mathematical deps. вҶ’ author a small `lem:compose_three_squares` blueprint stub (statement + one-line informal proof: "compose three commuting squares term-mode") and `\uses`-wire it into `lem:htensorComparison_naturality`'s proof. This is the ONLY unmatched node (`dag-query unmatched count=1`).

## Reusable proof patterns (confirmed/reinforced this iter)
- **Term-mode-only on sheafification/`tensorBC` composites:** `rw` / `reassoc_of%` / `slice` / `set` / `calc` ALL FAIL on composites with non-syntactic sheafification instance paths or `tensorBC` (= `tensorMod F (f^*В·)`) defeq-not-syntactic junctions (`rw` matches only to reducible transparency; `set` *silently* fails to abbreviate `pullbackTensorComparison.appвҖҰ.hom` legs; `calc` throws `Trans Eq Eq` synth failures). **Use term-mode `congrArg` + `Category.assoc`** (now packaged as `compose_three_squares`).
- **Corepresentation reflection for naturality squares:** both verticals-composed-with-Оё are morphisms OUT of the corepr object вҶ’ apply `(H_represents вҖҰ).some.inv.app W` (bijection) to reduce a square to an identity of universal elements; `coyoneda.map_preimage` expands `HMapFst`; `NatTrans.naturality_apply` (NOT deprecated `FunctorToTypes.naturality`) for the RHS.
- **Presheaf `tensorHom`-comp lemmas** fire under `simp [comp_app, tensorHom_app]` only with explicit `(R := X.presheaf)`; the residual ModuleCat `вҠ—вӮҳ`+id goal closes by `MonoidalCategory.whisker_exchange` via `exact` (not `rw`).
- **Associator naturality bridge:** `(tensorAssocNatIsoвӮғ F L).inv.app Y = (tensorAssoc F L Y).hom` holds by `rfl`; use `.inv.naturality` (direction matters вҖ” `.hom` gave a type mismatch).

## Blocked вҖ” do NOT re-assign
- **`ext_finite_flat` (1.10):** infra-blocked. `IsLFPAndFlatOn` opaque; needs `relExt` real (internal `в„°xt` + `R^q f_*`, both absent in Mathlib). Out of reach this strand; leave untouched until that infra exists.

## Convergence note
1.1.3 STEP 2.5 is now COMPLETE (a/b/c@036 + d@037). Lane is converging on plan: @035 STEP1+2 вҶ’ @036 STEP2.5-a/b/c вҶ’ @037 STEP2.5-d вҶ’ next STEP 3 close. No churn flag. The ~51 REPL probes this iter were the documented cost of the term-mode-only constraint, not a stall вҖ” the deliverable landed axiom-clean first build.
